title: mollia stellata
intro: Mollia stellata, also known as star-eyed mollia, is a flowering plant species in the family Diapensiaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Mollia stellata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
